sets.name: Fresher Interview Set
sets.summary: Entry-level interview quiz for Python basics, files, JSON, testing, and simple debugging.

sets.name: Intermediate Interview Set
sets.summary: Mid-level interview quiz for APIs, database work, async, retries, and implementation tradeoffs.

sets.name: Senior Interview Set
sets.summary: Hard interview quiz for scaling, reliability, architecture, operations, and AI/system tradeoffs.

sets.name: Bilingual VI/EN Interview Set
sets.summary: Vietnamese and English interview prompts for learning terminology and answer phrasing.
